name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini follow-up turn after a function_call. Shape grounded in a real `gemini-flash-latest` round-trip captured 2026-05-19. CRITICAL: the prior-turn `function_call` part MUST be echoed back with its original `thought_signature`, or Gemini rejects the request with INVALID_ARGUMENT. After the function_response is supplied, the final text reply has no thought_signature (deterministic answer needs no extra reasoning). Renderer pairs the call with its response visually.

parts.text: What's the weather in Tokyo right now?

function_declarations.name: get_weather
function_declarations.description: Get the current weather for a city.

parts.text: It's currently clear in Tokyo with a temperature of 14°C.
